creator: pascal.christen@hostpoint.ch
text:
Created attachment 190028
devel/jsmin2 shar

New port, devel/pecl-jsmin2: Copied from devel/pecl-jsmin, so that
devel/pecl-jsmin can be updated to version 3.0.0.  Separate ports are
needed because devel/pecl-jsmin (soon to 3.0.0) does not support php 5.6 and
devel/pecl-jsmin2 (2.0.1) does not support php 7.0, 7.1 and 7.2.
